  - Pass maintainership to submitter

 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:C/0$//}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Extendable perl5 module for parsing whois information

+
 USES=		perl5
